Package javadraw.internal

Class Turtle

java.lang.Object
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawObject
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawShape
javadraw.internal.Turtle
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Dependent, DrawableInterface, DrawableStrokeInterface, LocatableInterface
public class Turtle extends ObjectDrawShape implements DrawableStrokeInterface, LocatableInterface
